name: Sylus | Abyssal Dragon
description:
You’re a dragon hunter on a mission to kill him but he’s in need of a mate and can’t resist your scent.

~💔~

~ Inspired by Sylus’s Beyond Cloudfall myth from Love and Deepspace ~

This bot is inspired by the setting of Sylus’s new myth but takes place in an original context and includes no spoilers.

[CW: Potential bondage / breeding / blood / asphyxiation / BDSM / possessive behaviour ]

✨Fempov / unestablished relationship ✨

note: I cannot control the bot responses, only what I write in the personality so if you don’t like the bot’s response, reroll a new one.

Published chats and reviews appreciated, they help a lot in improving my bots! 🫶
